title: skill-engine source-paths.json
description: Registry of the upstream sources a contextualizer tracks. This file is the machine-readable transcription of the contract that verify.sh Check 1 (source-paths-shape) and Check 2 (source-entries) enforce at audit time. One semantic rule is not expressible in JSON Schema and remains enforced only by verify.sh: web-doc page_list URLs must share an origin with the source url. Schema evolution is additive — unknown keys are tolerated (additionalProperties is open) so older and newer files validate against the same contract. Optional cross-axis fields (url/path/sitemap_url/page_list on the kinds where they are not required) accept an explicit null as equivalent to absent, matching verify.sh's `.field // ""` reading; the required field for each kind must still be a non-null value.

schema_version.description: Schema version. Additive evolution; v1 is still current.

sources.description: The tracked sources. May be empty (no sources registered yet).

source.description: A single tracked source. Required: id, kind, status, lifecycle.state, and (per kind) at least one of url-or-path. Additive fields (archived, discovered_via, lifecycle.last_checked, etc.) are tolerated.

id.description: Stable identifier. Used as a cache-path component at bootstrap, where it is additionally constrained to ^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9-]*$ before being interpolated into a filesystem path.

url.description: Source URL. Required (non-null) for git-managed and web-doc; absent or explicit null for external-doc and local-path. An explicit null is treated as absent, matching verify.sh's `.url // ""` reading.

path.description: Filesystem path. Required (non-null) for external-doc and local-path; absent or explicit null for web-doc. An explicit null is treated as absent, matching verify.sh's `.path // ""` reading.

branch.description: git-managed only; must be git-ref-safe. Absent ⇒ downstream code uses HEAD.

crawl_mode.description: web-doc only. 'sitemap' crawls from a sitemap; 'list' crawls an explicit page_list.

crawl_budget.description: web-doc only; max pages to crawl.

sitemap_url.description: web-doc crawl_mode 'sitemap' only; absent or explicit null when crawl_mode is 'list'.

page_list.description: web-doc crawl_mode 'list' only. Absent or explicit null when crawl_mode is 'sitemap'. Each URL must share an origin with the source url (origin equality is enforced by verify.sh, not this schema).
